plan_under_test: Make output-integrity missing mark-scheme failures actionable by grouping unexpected missing mark-scheme image paths by paper and source companion.
tests_added_or_changed: Updated test_current_output_integrity_fails_on_new_missing_paths_and_duplicates to include two unexpected missing mark-scheme records for the same paper and assert unexpected_missing_mark_scheme_groups contains paper, source_companion, count, question_ids, and question_numbers.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, the test should fail because audit_current_output_integrity does not include unexpected_missing_mark_scheme_groups.
what_passing_proves: Unexpected missing mark-scheme records are grouped deterministically by paper and source companion.
The report exposes complete affected question IDs/numbers for the group instead of relying only on truncated examples.
Existing failure status and counts remain active.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not repair the missing mark-scheme image paths in output/json/question_bank.json.
It does not prove which source PDFs are actually unavailable.
It does not validate visual content of any mark-scheme PNG.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The test extends an existing output-integrity fixture and asserts deterministic report fields from real records.
